Broward County Parks & Rec, 3900 SW 100th Ave, Davie, FL 33328, USA

Lots of muscadine grape vines and pitanga trees all throughout the park, but especially alone the trails. The grapes won't be ready until late July/August, but the pitangas are fruiting right now as of May 2025.
